---
title: "Course README"
---

# Responsible Use of Generative AI

Responsible Use of Generative AI is a short course for researchers and research support staff who want to use AI more selectively, transparently, and defensibly.

## Course Scope

The course supports participants to:

- understand how AI changes research work and judgement,
- design stronger prompts with clearer boundaries,
- validate AI outputs against real sources,
- document AI-assisted work in a lightweight but useful way,
- recognise when AI use should remain manual rather than automated.

## Contributing

Contribution guidance is available in [CONTRIBUTING.qmd](CONTRIBUTING.qmd).

## Supporting Documents

- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.qmd)
- [License](LICENSE.qmd)
- [Learner Profiles](profiles/learner-profiles.qmd)
